ogTitle: Won Wron vs Wonga: Climate Safety

heading: Won Wron vs Wonga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Won Wron, Victoria and Wonga, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Won Wron has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Wonga (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Won Wron or Wonga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Won Wron has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Wonga scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Won Wron scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Wonga scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Won Wron or Wonga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Won Wron has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
